name: MPI Hello And Benchmark
summary: Compile and run MPI sanity checks across allocated nodes.
description: This skill provides a minimal MPI hello-world program and Slurm batch script to verify compiler, launcher, and node-to-node execution.

inputs.name: mpi_module
inputs.description: MPI module to load before compiling.

inputs.name: nodes
inputs.description: Number of nodes for the sanity check.

outputs.name: mpi_binary
outputs.description: Temporary MPI hello-world executable removed when the smoke test exits.

outputs.name: rank_report
outputs.description: Rank, size, and hostname output from each MPI process.

outputs.name: rank_validation
outputs.description: Offline completeness, communicator-size, and host summary for a saved MPI hello log.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example files.
Validate complete rank output from a synthetic two-node hello run.
Submit the batch script on a test partition and confirm ranks run across the requested nodes.
